# Portfolio & Case Studies — 16 Production Systems

<!-- generated by scripts/generate-positioning.py from positioning-seeds.json · repo: organvm/portfolio -->

A public portfolio site showcasing 16 completed production systems — each with a case study, real architecture diagrams (p5.js interactive), live demos where applicable, and the decision trees behind the build. Built with Astro, deployed on Netlify, fully indexed and discoverable.

**Built to production weight:** 609 files · Astro + TypeScript · p5.js interactive visualizations · 69 test files across the portfolio + content · 16 case studies with architecture, decisions, and outcomes · Live demos & interactive diagrams · Netlify deployment + CI/CD · SEO-optimized content sites.

**Who this is for:** Prospects who want to see the builder's decision-making process, architects and design teams evaluating a platform partner, companies studying real production systems.

**The expensive problem:** A portfolio of demos and one-liners doesn't prove judgment. Seeing the tradeoffs, the decisions, the outcomes, and the architecture is the difference between 'built something' and 'ships production systems'.

**What it costs you to not have this:** Vague feature lists and cherry-picked metrics. Real diligence requires seeing how a builder thinks through constraints, scales, and failure modes.

## Ways to work together

Pick the depth that fits. Each level is a deeper build than the last.

| Path | What you get | Cadence |
|------|--------------|---------|
| **1 · Learn from the portfolio** (Self-serve) | Public access to the 16 case studies: architecture, decisions, scaled-to-production proof. | Ongoing |
| **2 · Deep-dive workshop** (2-day workshop) | Interactive walkthrough of decision trees across 3–4 case studies; apply the thinking to your constraints. | On demand |
| **3 · Hire for a production pilot** (3-month engagement) | Dedicate the builder to your constraint set. Design one system to your exact shape, deploy it, handoff the code and runbook. | One-time |
| **4 · Retain as platform director** (Ongoing retainer) | Standing relationship: new systems, architecture reviews, on-call for scaling decisions, systems thinking as your company grows. | Ongoing |

## What's open — and what you're buying

**Open:** All 16 case studies, the architecture diagrams, the interactive demos, the decision trees, the deployed live systems.

**What you're buying:** The internal evaluation — which projects to feature, what to emphasize, how the portfolio evolves as new systems are built.
